focus: C114: R1b proof-of-concept written — NCF v0.1 prototype grammar for AI circuit claims. Demonstrates R1b achievability: modular arithmetic Grokking circuit fully specified in NCF (9 nodes, 7 edges, 7 claims, 9 apparatus-computable verification conditions). interpretability-grounding-si.md updated through C114. D4 streak: 105.

igt_status.name: Interpretability-Grounding Theorem
igt_status.d4_blocked_by: DC#3 full — requires R1 full (R1a+R1b+R1c) + R3 full (AICD institutional mandate) + P1 prediction confirmed
igt_status.forward_prediction: P1 — circuit-verified claims replicate >85%; behavioral benchmark rankings replicate <50%

dc3_gap_status.r1_gap: Three-component design (igt-r1-architecture.md, C112): R1a (reference computation — modular arithmetic Grokking task p=97); R1b (formal specification language — NCF v0.1 prototype grammar now written in igt-r1b-proof-of-concept.md, C114); R1c (cross-tool calibration metric — Circuit IoU + Causal Agreement Index). R1a: ~2-5 years. Full R1: ~10-15 years.
dc3_gap_status.r1b_status: Proof-of-concept complete (C114). NCF v0.1 grammar defined and applied to Grokking circuit. Gap is institutional (community agreement, apparatus library, AICD infrastructure) not technical. Timeline: ~5-10 years from formal proposal.
dc3_gap_status.r3_gap: AICD (AI Circuit Database) as wwPDB analog. Five required properties in igt-wwpdb-analog-architecture.md (C111). Phase 2 entry enabled by R1a; Phase 3 requires R1b + R1c + mandatory enforcement.
dc3_gap_status.r1_r3_dependency: R1b is required before AICD apparatus-computed validation can verify causal claims (Phase 3). NCF v0.1 is the deposit format prototype for AICD. AICD Phase 2 can begin with NCF v0.1 partial claims.
dc3_gap_status.phase_2_entry_marker: R1a — agreed reference computation (modular arithmetic / Grokking task). Voluntary AICD deposition begins. NCF v0.1 deposit format available.
dc3_gap_status.phase_3_entry_marker: R1 full (R1a+R1b+R1c) + R3 full (AICD mandatory enforcement + consortium governance + agreed calibration threshold). DC#3 full evaluable.

spine_status: network-spine-c106.md current through C112 (updated C113). §9 contains full R1 three-component design, two-phase AICD trajectory, R1–R3 dependency chain. Spine update for C114 R1b POC pending (next cycle or bundled).
r1b_poc_status: NCF v0.1 proof-of-concept document: state/decisions/igt-r1b-proof-of-concept.md. Demonstrates: (1) grammar is writable; (2) apparatus-computable verification is specifiable now; (3) gap is institutional not technical. Grokking p=97 circuit fully specified: 9 nodes, 7 edges, 7 claims (CL001-CL007), 9 verification conditions using 6 standard apparatus IDs.
